Quarkus_Framework/Quarkus_Iniciante/prim.general_idea: Replace deprecated Paths.get() with Path.of() for Java 11+ compatibility.
Update the Maven compiler plugin version to a newer snapshot release.
Change the Maven compiler release property from Java 17 to Java 21.
Quarkus_Framework/Quarkus_Iniciante/prim.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17 APIs, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 language features and potentially causing runtime issues if Java 21-specific code is introduced.

Quarkus_Framework/Quarkus_Iniciante/prim.general_idea: Explicitly set the release configuration in the maven-compiler-plugin to 21.
Quarkus_Framework/Quarkus_Iniciante/prim.why_exists: Ensures the compiler plugin explicitly targets Java 21 bytecode and API, overriding any default or inherited settings that might target an older version.
